name: localsearch-extractor-ffmpeg
title: localsearch-extractor-ffmpeg
description:
FFmpeg powered media metadata extractor
This package contains the FFmpeg powered metadata extractor.
.
Due to distribution complications with FFmpeg, this feature is
available in a separate package. Without this, indexing of
audio/video files will not be supported.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use localsearch-extractor-ffmpeg because FFmpeg powered media metadata extractor.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use localsearch-extractor-ffmpeg as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair localsearch-extractor-ffmpeg with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `localsearch-extractor-ffmpeg --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
